  • API Reference
  • Types
  • Types

Types

Core data types, configuration structs, enums, and exception types used throughout Mem0.jl.

Configuration Types

Mem0.MemoryConfig — Type
MemoryConfig

Top-level configuration for the Memory system.

Mem0.LlmConfig — Type

LLM provider configuration.

Mem0.EmbedderConfig — Type

Embedding provider configuration.

Mem0.VectorStoreConfig — Type

Vector store configuration.

Mem0.GraphStoreConfig — Type

Graph store configuration.

Mem0.RerankerConfig — Type

Reranker configuration.

Data Types

Mem0.MemoryItem — Type
MemoryItem

A single memory record returned from search/get operations.

Mem0.MemoryResult — Type
MemoryResult

Result from add/search/get_all operations.

Mem0.ChatMessage — Type

A chat message with role and content.

Memory Type Enum

Mem0.MemoryType — Type

Memory type classification.

The MemoryType enum has three values:

  • SEMANTIC_MEMORY — facts and concepts
  • EPISODIC_MEMORY — events and experiences
  • PROCEDURAL_MEMORY — skills and procedures

Internal Data Types

Mem0.VectorRecord — Type
VectorRecord

A single record in the vector store.

Mem0.LLMResponse — Type
LLMResponse

Standardized response from an LLM call.

History Manager

Mem0.HistoryManager — Type
HistoryManager

Thread-safe SQLite-based history tracker for memory operations (add, update, delete).

Exceptions

Mem0.Mem0Error — Type
Mem0Error <: Exception

Base exception for all Mem0 errors.

Mem0.Mem0ValidationError — Type
Mem0ValidationError <: Exception

Raised when input validation fails (missing filters, invalid config, etc.).

Mem0.Mem0ProviderError — Type
Mem0ProviderError <: Exception

Raised when an LLM, embedder, or vector store provider fails.
